requirements.how: Sign up at lob.com — no credit card required for test mode
lob.com → Dashboard → Settings → API Keys → copy test_... key

requirements.description: LOB_LIVE_API_KEY (optional — only needed for real sends)
requirements.how: Same location — copy live_... key. Only required when LOB_LIVE_MODE=true

steps.title: Wire lob-mcp into Claude Code
steps.command: claude mcp add lob --env LOB_TEST_API_KEY=test_... --env LOB_LIVE_MODE=false --env LOB_MAX_PIECES_PER_RUN=10 -- npx -y lob-mcp
steps.note: Key set by user — restart required to load server

steps.title: Test full flow: address validation, letter preview+commit, postcard preview+commit
steps.note: Verified 2026-06-06 — all 5 steps pass in test mode. Key gotcha: use_type is required on every piece ('operational' for letters, 'marketing' for postcards); commit payload must exactly match preview payload for token acceptance in live mode.

steps.title: Choose next wizard power to build
